title: The surprising cost of caring for aging parents: Divorce
summary: This article explores how caregiving responsibilities for aging parents can create financial and mental-health pressures on marriages. The financial burden and stress of elder care can contribute to relationship strain and divorce.
content: Mental-health and financial pressures can strain even strong marriages.

zh.title: 照顾老年父母的惊人代价：离婚
zh.summary: 这篇文章探讨了照顾老年父母的责任如何对婚姻造成经济和心理健康压力。老年护理的经济负担和压力可能导致关系紧张和离婚。

title: Stephen Colbert returns to TV in appearance on local Michigan station
summary: Stephen Colbert made a television appearance on a local Michigan station just one day after his final episode of "The Late Show" on CBS. The brief hosting gig marks a quick return to television for the late-night host.
content: A day after his last episode of “The Late Show” on CBS, Colbert found his way back to a television hosting gig for one night.

zh.title: 斯蒂芬·科尔伯特在密歇根州地方电视台露面，重返电视荧屏
zh.summary: 斯蒂芬·科尔伯特在其《晚间秀》在CBS的最后一集播出仅一天后，在密歇根州的一家地方电视台进行了电视露面。这次短暂的主持工作标志着这位深夜脱口秀主持人快速回归电视圈。

title: Bulls push the S&P 500 back near records — here’s what drove the market last week
summary: The S&P 500 rallied near record levels last week, driven primarily by higher oil prices and despite volatility in bond markets. These factors nearly interrupted the index's winning streak.
content: The combination of higher oil prices and bond market volatility nearly snapped the S&P 500's winning streak.

zh.title: 多头推动标普500指数接近纪录高位——以下是上周推动市场的因素
zh.summary: 上周标普500指数反弹至接近纪录水平，主要受油价上升驱动，尽管债券市场出现波动。这些因素几乎中断了该指数的连胜纪录。

title: These 4 market sectors look frothy — and Nvidia’s isn’t even the biggest bubble
summary: Four market sectors are showing signs of excessive valuations, with analysis suggesting the S&P 500 faces a 30 percent probability of a crash within two years. Interestingly, Nvidia is not identified as the most overvalued sector among those analyzed.
content: S&P 500 has a 30% chance of crashing over the next two years. That’s the good news.

zh.title: 这4个市场板块看起来过热——英伟达甚至不是最大的泡沫
zh.summary: 四个市场板块显示出估值过高的迹象,分析表明标普500指数在两年内面临30%的崩盘概率。有趣的是,英伟达未被认定为所分析板块中估值最高的。

title: U.S. and Iran are closing in on a 60-day ceasefire extension with nuclear framework, FT reports
summary: The United States and Iran are negotiating a potential 60-day extension of their ceasefire agreement, according to Financial Times reporting. The current fragile ceasefire, in place since April 8, has been marked by periodic skirmishes over control of the Strait of Hormuz.
content: A fragile ceasefire has been in place since April 8, punctuated by skirmishes as the U.S. and Iran jockey over the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 美国和伊朗正在就60天停火延期和核框架达成协议,英国《金融时报》报道
zh.summary: 据英国《金融时报》报道,美国和伊朗正在协商可能的60天停火延期协议。自4月8日以来实施的当前脆弱停火协议,一直伴随着围绕霍尔木兹海峡控制权的定期冲突。

title: Kyle Busch died after severe pneumonia progressed into sepsis, his family says
summary: Two-time NASCAR champion Kyle Busch died at age 41 following complications from severe pneumonia that developed into sepsis. The death occurred one day after Busch lost consciousness in a Chevrolet simulator.
content: Busch, a two-time NASCAR champion, died at 41 on Thursday, a day after passing out in a Chevrolet simulator.

zh.title: 凯尔·布什因严重肺炎恶化为败血症而去世,其家人称
zh.summary: 两届纳斯卡冠军凯尔·布什因严重肺炎并发症发展为败血症在41岁时去世。布什在雪佛兰模拟器中失去意识的一天后去世。

title: ‘It will not bring you happiness’: I have advice for your single, childless 62-year-old multimillionaire reader
summary: A financial advice columnist offers perspective to a wealthy single reader without children, suggesting that material wealth alone does not guarantee happiness. The advice includes concrete suggestions for using wealth to benefit others.
content: “Go to Walmart and pay off someone’s layaway account.”

zh.title: "这不会给你带来幸福":我对你单身、无子女、62岁百万富翁读者有建议
zh.summary: 一位财务建议专栏作家为一位没有子女的富有单身读者提供观点,建议仅有的物质财富不能保证幸福。建议包括利用财富造福他人的具体建议。

title: U.S. adds Atlanta area airport for Ebola screening, CDC says
summary: The Centers for Disease Control has designated Atlanta area airports to screen returning travelers for Ebola virus exposure. The move expands screening protocols beyond Washington's Dulles International Airport.
content: Washington's Dulles International Airport was designated this week to screen returning citizens for the Ebola virus.

zh.title: 美国疾病控制与预防中心表示在亚特兰大地区机场增加埃博拉病毒筛查
zh.summary: 美国疾病控制与预防中心已指定亚特兰大地区机场对返回的旅客进行埃博拉病毒暴露筛查。此举扩展了筛查协议,超越华盛顿杜勒斯国际机场。

title: More states are offering caregiver tax credits for families — but they only offset a fraction of expenses
summary: An increasing number of states are implementing tax credits to support family caregivers, though these credits offset only a small portion of actual caregiving expenses. Caregivers continue to face significant financial strain and career disruptions.
content: Family caregivers often experience financial strain and career setbacks.

zh.title: 越来越多州为家庭提供护理人员税收抵免——但这些抵免仅抵消费用的一小部分
zh.summary: 越来越多的州正在实施税收抵免,以支持家庭护理人员,尽管这些抵免仅抵消实际护理费用的一小部分。护理人员继续面临重大的财务压力和职业中断。

title: Delivery Hero confirms takeover offer from Uber
summary: Delivery Hero has confirmed receiving a takeover offer from Uber, which has increased its stake in the company to approximately 19.5 percent of issued capital. Uber is now Delivery Hero's largest shareholder.
content: Delivery Hero said last week its U.S. rival had increased its holding to about 19.5% of issued capital from roughly 7%, becoming its largest shareholder.

zh.title: Delivery Hero确认来自Uber的收购要约
zh.summary: Delivery Hero已确认收到Uber的收购要约，Uber已将其在该公司的股份增加到已发行资本的约19.5%。Uber现在是Delivery Hero最大的股东。

title: Millennials spend $252 on an average date, BMO finds — and social media is spiraling over 'date-flation'
summary: Research from BMO finds that millennials spend an average of $252 per date, with dating costs rising faster than general inflation rates. The trend is prompting many Americans to reduce dating frequency, choose lower-cost alternatives, or avoid dating altogether.
content: Dating costs are rising faster than inflation, pushing many Americans to go on fewer dates, choose cheaper plans or skip dating altogether.

zh.title: BMO发现千禧一代平均约会支出252美元——社交媒体对"约会通胀"炸锅了
zh.summary: BMO的研究发现，千禧一代平均每次约会支出252美元，约会成本上升速度超过总体通胀率。这一趋势促使许多美国人减少约会频率、选择成本更低的替代方案或完全避免约会。

title: Microsoft’s new responsible tech lead on how to humanize high-speed AI development
summary: Jenny Lay-Flurrie, head of Microsoft's Trusted Technology Group, discusses the company's approach to responsible AI development amid rapid advancement. Her vision emphasizes building technology correctly and maintaining ethical standards throughout the development process.
content: Jenny Lay-Flurrie, head of Microsoft's Trusted Technology Group, says responsible tech is: How do we build it right? And how do we keep it that way?

zh.title: 微软新任责任技术负责人谈如何在高速AI开发中保持人文关怀
zh.summary: 微软信任技术小组负责人Jenny Lay-Flurrie讨论了该公司在快速发展中的负责任AI开发方法。她的愿景强调在整个开发过程中正确构建技术并维持伦理标准。

title: Lingering mysteries from Berkshire's portfolio update
summary: Berkshire Hathaway's recent portfolio update includes the unexpected additions of Delta Air Lines and Macy's, moves that analysts find difficult to reconcile with the company's typical investment strategy. These new positions raise questions about the rationale behind recent allocation decisions.
content: The addition of two new names, Delta Air Lines and Macy's, to the portfolio are hard to explain.

zh.title: 伯克希尔投资组合更新背后的谜团
zh.summary: 伯克希尔哈撒韦最近的投资组合更新意外增加了达美航空公司和梅西公司的头寸，这些举动让分析师难以与公司典型的投资战略相协调。这些新头寸引发了对最近资产配置决策背后理由的疑问。

title: These stocks have plenty of upside as June approaches, Bank of America says
summary: Bank of America has identified five stocks with significant upside potential as the market heads into June. These selections suggest strong growth prospects over the near term and beyond.
content: The firm named five stocks that have plenty more room to run in June and beyond.

zh.title: 美国银行称随着6月临近，这些股票上升空间很大
zh.summary: 美国银行已识别出五只股票，在市场进入6月时具有显著的上升潜力。这些选择表明短期及更长期内有强劲的增长前景。

title: Stock market returns are often subpar after a strong 3-year streak, history shows
summary: Historical analysis indicates that stock market returns tend to underperform following extended periods of strong performance, such as the current three-year streak. Investors should temper expectations for continued double-digit annual gains.
content: While the market has posted solid double-digit returns in the past three years, investors shouldn't get their hopes up that the trend will continue.

zh.title: 历史数据显示，在强势3年后股市收益通常表现不佳
zh.summary: 历史分析表明，股市收益在长期强势表现之后往往会表现不足，比如当前的三年上升趋势。投资者应该对继续实现两位数年度收益的预期保持审慎态度。

title: Nvidia says its forecast for $200 billion CPU market includes China
summary: Nvidia's $200 billion CPU market forecast includes significant demand from China, signaling confidence in long-term processor demand despite geopolitical tensions. The forecast reflects sustained market opportunities beyond current trade uncertainties.
content: Nvidia's latest forecast signals it still sees significant long-term demand for central processing units.

zh.title: 英伟达表示其200亿美元CPU市场预测包括中国
zh.summary: 英伟达的200亿美元CPU市场预测包括来自中国的巨大需求，表明尽管地缘政治紧张局势，但对长期处理器需求充满信心。该预测反映了超越当前贸易不确定性的持续市场机遇。

title: High fuel prices test limits of summer vacation spending
summary: High fuel prices are testing consumer willingness to pay for summer travel as the season kicks off over Memorial Day weekend. Airline demand and ticket prices during this period will reveal how much travelers prioritize vacations despite fuel costs.
content: The unofficial start of the summer travel season on Memorial Day weekend will show just how much travelers want to fly and how much they're willing to pay.

zh.title: 高油价考验暑期度假支出的极限
zh.summary: 随着纪念日周末暑期旅游季的开始，高油价正在考验消费者为暑期旅行支付的意愿。这一时期的航空公司需求和机票价格将揭示旅行者在燃油成本影响下对度假的优先程度。

title: Three signs from APEC that the U.S. and China remain far apart on trade
summary: Despite recent diplomatic meetings between U.S. and Chinese officials following the Trump-Xi summit, APEC discussions reveal persistent disagreements on trade priorities. The gap between the two nations' positions suggests prolonged trade tensions ahead.
content: U.S. and Chinese officials have met and spoken publicly about differing priorities since the Trump-Xi summit concluded in Beijing last week.

zh.title: 亚太经合组织的三个迹象表明美国和中国在贸易方面仍相差甚远
zh.summary: 尽管在特朗普-习近平峰会后美中官员进行了最近的外交会议，但亚太经合组织讨论显示在贸易优先事项上存在持续的分歧。两国立场之间的差距表明贸易紧张局势将持续。

title: Magnitude 6 earthquake strikes Hawaii’s Big Island; USGS assessing Kilauea volcano
summary: A magnitude 6 earthquake struck Hawaii's Big Island, prompting USGS assessment of nearby Kilauea, one of the world's most active volcanoes. The geological survey will determine whether seismic activity poses volcanic eruption risks.
content: Kilauea, one of the world's most active volcanoes, is located on Hawaii's Big Island.

zh.title: 6级地震袭击夏威夷大岛；美国地质调查局评估基拉韦厄火山
zh.summary: 6级地震袭击夏威夷大岛，促使美国地质调查局对附近的基拉韦厄火山进行评估，该火山是世界上最活跃的火山之一。地质调查将确定地震活动是否存在火山喷发风险。

title: Temperatures are rising - and so are ice cream prices
summary: Rising temperatures across the country are driving up ice cream prices as summer demand increases. The price surge reflects seasonal demand pressures as consumers seek cooling treats during hotter weather.
content: Temperatures are rising across the country, and so is the price of ice cream - but by how much?

zh.title: 气温在上升——冰淇淋价格也在上升
zh.summary: 全国气温上升导致冰淇淋价格上涨，因为夏季需求增加。价格上涨反映了季节性需求压力，消费者在炎热天气中寻求冰冷饮品。

title: The Leeds designer outlet that's 15 miles from Leeds
summary: A rebranding of Junction 32 retail park near Castleford has drawn local backlash despite being marketed as a Leeds designer outlet located 15 miles away. The rebrand appears to have missed expectations among nearby residents.
content: A rebrand of the junction 32 retail park off the M62 has gone down poorly with some locals in Castleford.

zh.title: 距离利兹15英里的利兹设计师折扣店
zh.summary: 靠近卡斯尔福德的Junction 32零售园的重新品牌化尽管被宣传为距离利兹15英里的利兹设计师折扣店，但引起了当地的反弹。这次重新品牌化似乎未能达到附近居民的预期。

title: SpaceX launches Starship test flight on second try
summary: SpaceX successfully launched its massive Starship rocket on Friday, a day after scrubbing the previous attempt. The test flight advances the company's development of its next-generation heavy-lift launch vehicle.
content: SpaceX launched its massive Starship rocket on Friday, a day after the company scrubbed plans before takeoff.

zh.title: SpaceX第二次尝试成功发射星舰测试飞行
zh.summary: SpaceX在周五成功发射其巨大的星舰火箭,该公司在前一天取消了发射计划。此次测试飞行推进了该公司下一代重型运载火箭的开发。
